overview: I built a multi-agent adversarial workflow to pressure-test marketing claims. Sub-agents gather evidence in parallel, then Opus-powered adversary and Haiku defender agents loop until a convergence guard exits.

keyPoints.title: 12 evidence agents selected by claim type at runtime
Adversarial loop uses Opus attacker, Haiku defender, convergence guard
~360k tokens, ~$4.38 per run on early parallel test
Hygiene-passing claim failed: fictional domain, circular citations
Synthesizer alone sees full evidence + adversarial transcript
